summary: Comprehensive testing of Hynexs Edu Counseller - both backend and frontend. All core features functional. 11/13 backend tests passed (2 minor fixes applied). Frontend fully operational.

minor.issue: Email normalized to lowercase, test expectation mismatch - fixed in test
Returns 400 'Already premium user' for admin - expected behavior, fixed test to use non-premium user

integration_issues.issue: Gemini response shows raw markdown (**bold** text) not rendered as formatted HTML. Counselor.jsx needs markdown rendering library (e.g., react-markdown)

issues: Markdown formatting (**bold**, ### headers) rendered as raw text instead of HTML

action_items: Add markdown rendering in AI Counselor chat (react-markdown or similar) - currently showing **bold** as literal asterisks
critical_code_review_comments: AI Counselor response doesn't render markdown - Gemini Flash returns markdown-formatted text but Counselor.jsx renders it as plain text
seed_admin() only creates admin if not existing - doesn't update password if changed (minor but could cause issues)

Dashboard prediction form: when on overview tab and submitting prediction, it navigates to predictions tab - good UX but predictions state is managed in parent component. If user navigates away and returns, predictions are preserved (good)
FAQ section on landing page uses Accordion component but Playwright couldn't find buttons - verify FAQ accordion implementation uses proper accessible buttons
seed_data_creation: Several test users created via register API during backend tests (TEST_ prefixed emails)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core flows work: login, register, predictions (TSEAMCET + JOSAA), AI insights, AI counselor, admin panel. Main issue is AI counselor shows raw markdown. Data loaded: 189,407 JOSAA + 52,835 TS EAMCET records. Backend uses JWT tokens in localStorage + httpOnly cookies. Frontend REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://counseling-compass-1.preview.emergentagent.com
